disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe cramping, colicky abdominal pain coming in waves over the last 24 hours
trigger_question_examples: Can you describe the tummy pain?
Does the pain come and go in waves?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's a horrible gripping cramp that comes in waves and takes my breath away — I can't keep still.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Recurrent large-volume green/yellow (bilious) vomiting; unable to keep fluids down
trigger_question_examples: Have you been vomiting?
What does the vomit look like?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I keep bringing up big amounts of green-yellow fluid and I can't keep even water down.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No flatus or bowel motion for two days (absolute constipation)
trigger_question_examples: When did you last open your bowels or pass wind?
Have you been able to pass any gas?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Nothing has come out at all — no wind, no motion — for two whole days now.

trigger_question_examples: Does your tummy feel or look swollen?
Is your belly more bloated than usual?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My belly is all swollen and bloated and tight.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Insidious change in bowel habit to persistent constipation over four months
trigger_question_examples: Have your bowels changed over the last few months?
Is the constipation new for you?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Over the last few months I've been getting more and more blocked up — it's not like me at all.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Intermittent bright red blood mixed in with the stool
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any blood when you go to the toilet?
Any blood mixed in with your stool?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Now that you ask — yes, a few times over the last while I've seen bright red blood mixed in with the stool.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: I didn't like to mention it — I hoped it was just piles.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Significant unintentional weight loss (~8 kg) with loss of appetite over three months
trigger_question_examples: Have you lost any weight without trying?
How has your appetite been?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've dropped a fair bit of weight — the family reckons about 8 kilos — and I've gone right off my food.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Persistent sensation of incomplete rectal emptying (tenesmus)
trigger_question_examples: Do you feel like you still need to go even after you've been?
Any feeling that your bowel isn't fully emptying?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes — I keep feeling like I need to go, but nothing comes.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Profound fatigue and lethargy over recent weeks
trigger_question_examples: How have your energy levels been?
Have you been more tired than usual?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've been utterly worn out and washed out, no energy at all.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Not taking any opioid analgesia or anti-motility/constipating medicines (pertinent negative)
trigger_question_examples: Are you taking any regular medications?
Any strong painkillers or anti-diarrhoea tablets?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I'm not on any painkillers or anything for the bowels — no regular tablets like that.
